posts.raw_content:
The 5050 Lie

There is something generational happening in my state and in our country. I believe everyone should be informed. So much so, that I am praying and hoping
someone makes a documentary on the topic. I want to spread awareness of the 5050 lie. 

See, I recently went through a divorce in the state of Washington when my ex went berserk over Trump getting re-elected. This is fine. Sad and
regrettable, but no surprise really.

One day, while I was at work, she took the kids and fled the city with them. Apparently, they changed the laws and this is no longer considered kidnapping
like it once was because that would be 'anti woman' somehow. She then decides to try and drain the bank accounts and then serves me papers. 

I immediately got a lawyer but this was right after Christmas by a few weeks and so I didn't have any savings and apparently she drained some bank
accounts prior to filing, which, funny enough, told ME that I was not allowed to touch my bank accounts. 

So already out of the gate, I am struggling for resources despite my high paying tech salary. 

The real insult? The court decides to give her 70/30 custody split for a 'temporary' parenting plan that was filed in an emergency timeline. Mostly, because
she wanted to book vacations and couldn't without knowing the kids schedules. 

The courts never told me why I wasn't given 5050 custody of my own children. Now... unlike most people, I have a good remote job, and I was a part of my kids
daily lives', so the typical 'Assylum' excuses were not used in court. They didn't really have to. She was able to just decree demands and the whole point of
the entire court system, wasn't for fair representation, but for curtailing to her demands. Nothing else mattered. Literally. 

I had receipts, pics, proof, and all things to logically and legally debate my ex's claims. However, the court didn't care. And with no reason given, 
My kids were stolen from me. 

As with anything, you go to research and ask around for information to better inform yourself. It is interesting when you meet others in the same boat. There
is this odd Shawshank Redemption like acknowledgement when you talk about this with other Fathers. We all have this quiet and unspoken joke, "You get your 5050?" 
knowing full well how much of a lie it is. 

Now, when you go online, you get all the fake news blasted media covering how fair the process is and how men actually aren't discriminated against,
and how equitable the now rural counties of Commington are. Once I started seeing the lies on the internet I knew....

I knew right away...

The thing is, I work in a highly competitive tech field, and yes, it comes with decent pay. The kind of pay that lets you have some hobby spending money, 
but not the kind of pay where you get to live carefree and the kind of job that has expectations and is stressful in the regards of being competitive. 
A typical, middle class income. However, my ex is a professional nurse of 15 years, but because she decided to not work as much during the last year of our 
marriage, I am now forced to pay her mortgage for the rest of my children's lives. I owe 2k a month.

Interestingly, the state has control over how child support gets calculated and has the authority to set how much money this is every year. Like all government spending, it is just a lever for them to throttle to tax Fatherhood.

 It is a form of taxation without representation. 

This money isn't going to my kids. There is no reason for me to be paying a professional 6 figured salary nurse over 2k
a month in "Support". Her primary reason for not working as given to the courts in writing is that she simplys doesn't want to commute. The commute is a hindrance
to her supporting her children. 

And thus, by law, the court ordered me to. Now... As a nurse in infinite demand, you can get 6 figure pay by simply requesting it. No interview needed. That field
is in such demand that so long as you qualify, you get paid. I on the other hand, am in a very at risk tech job with only a high school degree. I have no formal
training or college otherwise. 

Yet.... despite telling the courts all of this... I was given a choice because she was greedy and impatient and wanted a pay off immediately.... 

If I accepted this fate, I could have my kids back, but only 43% of the time. That's right. The courts were NEVER going to give me 5050 custody. EVER.

If I refused to bow in to the demands, the case would be given to a random, man hating Judge who, when I looked up the case statstics, give women what is 
known jokingly by the lawyers as the "Vanilla Contract".

The Vanilla Contract: A man only gets to see his children every other weekend for a dinner. The law gives the judge 100% jurisdiction and decision making power.

There is no checks. There is no balances. There is no law for this judge to follow. They get to decide everything, however they want. 

So, what would you do here? 

Would you take 43% custody or risk it all on a blind, most likely corrupt anti-men Washington judge or take the deal ?

So while I am turned into a real slave now, I at least have access to my own children.

The nurse also started signing up for every possible welfare service around: Food Stamps+++....

Yes, a highly trained professional nurse was taking money from all of you simply because she doesn't want to commute to work.

As you ask around, and I did, I couldn't find many men who actually got 5050. 

It is sooooooo prevalent that 80+% of the cases in this state, go to women like mine did. With no rhyme or reason.


My children were taken from me, but the devil had a price, and I decided to pay it.


This needs to be made into a documentary. 

Men need to be aware, that the institution of marriage is long broken and is being used to 'tax men' through state controlled worksheets of child support. Not to mention, in my state, a women can empty out everything you own, and simply leave, and demand, through threats of violence, that your children be removed from you.

They are stealing our children from us....

The kicker? After the mediation process, I was forced to sign a paper that said how fair and equitable the process is. Which, as you all know, means it is anything but.
